debug_info.goal:
G K L : Type
inst✝¹¹ : Group G
inst✝¹⁰ : Finite G
inst✝⁹ : CommRing K
inst✝⁸ : ValuativeRel K
inst✝⁷ : Field L
inst✝⁶ : ValuativeRel L
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace L
inst✝⁴ : IsNonarchimedeanLocalField L
inst✝³ : MulSemiringAction G L
inst✝² : Algebra K L
inst✝¹ : ValuativeExtension K L
inst✝ : IsGaloisGroup G K L
⊢ ShortComplex.ShortExact
    (IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.valuationShortComplex G K L inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
      inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝)

proof:
by
  have h_mono : Mono (valuationShortComplex G K L).f := by
    have h_mono_hom : Mono (valuationShortComplex G K L).f.hom := by
      rw [ModuleCat.mono_iff_injective]
      exact ker_v_injective
    constructor
    intro Z g₁ g₂ hfg
    exact Action.Hom.ext (h_mono_hom.right_cancellation g₁.hom g₂.hom
      (congrArg Action.Hom.hom hfg))
  have h_epi : Epi (valuationShortComplex G K L).g := by
    have h_epi_hom : Epi (valuationShortComplex G K L).g.hom := by
      rw [ModuleCat.epi_iff_surjective]
      exact v_surjective
    constructor
    intro Z g₁ g₂ hfg
    exact Action.Hom.ext (h_epi_hom.left_cancellation g₁.hom g₂.hom
      (congrArg Action.Hom.hom hfg))
  have h_exact : (valuationShortComplex G K L).Exact := by
    let F := Action.forget (ModuleCat ℤ) (MonCat.of G)
    have hF_preserves : F.PreservesHomology := Functor.preservesHomologyOfExact F
    rw [← ShortComplex.exact_map_iff_of_faithful
      (valuationShortComplex G K L) F]
    rw [ShortComplex.moduleCat_exact_iff_range_eq_ker]
    exact (LinearMap.exact_iff.mp ker_v_ker).symm
  exact ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk' h_exact h_mono h_epi
